---
title: "stage-2-visualization"
author: "Bekkmo & Guerrero"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Goal
Import and clean datasets in R, restructure them into tidy format, and merge them into a unified data frame to support the development of insightful and informative visualizations.

```{r}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

#Web Scraping

#scrape the category page, get all links
url = "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Category:Summer_Olympics_medal_tables"

page = read_html(url)

#loop through each link
links = page |>
  html_nodes("#mw-pages a") |>   # this targets the list of pages
  html_attr("href")

links = paste0("https://en.wikipedia.org", links)

links
```
